title: KBTV-022 Half-night Marbles, Marbles, Marbles, Marbles, Marbles, Marbles, Marbles? theory
description: The theory this time is "The married woman who comes out of the pachinko parlor at midnight is surely not going well with her husband, so I'm crazy"! When I was staking at a pachinko parlor, when I called out to a woman who looked like it, it was a wonderful married woman! Moreover, it's super beautiful! When I listen to the story, it seems that I'm not doing well with my husband. Take advantage of the loneliness of such a married woman and go to the spear room! How cool is it! ??
